build.//: Three profiles. development is for connecting to a local Metro server with dev tools; preview is the 'install on a colleague's phone' profile (signed APK / internal-distribution IPA, no Play Store / TestFlight gate); production is the App Store + Play Store profile.

android.//: APK over AAB so a tester can sideload via direct download (testers won't have Internal App Sharing access yet).

ios.//: Ad-hoc / enterprise signing; requires a paid Apple Developer account and the tester's UDID registered.

production.//: Populate Google Play + Apple credentials before first submit.
